papers.title: GS-Playground: A High-Throughput Photorealistic Simulator for Vision-Informed Robot Learning

papers.title: KinDER: A Physical Reasoning Benchmark for Robot Learning and Planning

papers.title: MiMo-Embodied: X-Embodied Foundation Model Technical Report

papers.title: RISE: Self-Improving Robot Policy with Compositional World Model

papers.title: DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA

papers.title: Genie Sim PanoRecon: Fast Immersive Scene Generation from Single-View Panorama
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.07105v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present Genie Sim PanoRecon, a feed-forward Gaussian-splatting pipeline that delivers high-fidelity, low-cost 3D scenes for robotic manipulation simulation. papers.title: Limited Linguistic Diversity in Embodied AI Datasets

papers.title: Vision-Language-Action in Robotics: A Survey of Datasets, Benchmarks, and Data Engines

papers.title: AmaraSpatial-10K: A Spatially and Semantically Aligned 3D Dataset for Spatial Computing and Embodied AI

papers.reason: 发布AmaraSpatial-10K数据集，提供空间与语义对齐的3D资产。解决部署前数据预处理痛点，但本质为数据资源发布，无算法创新。

papers.title: PhysCodeBench: Benchmarking Physics-Aware Symbolic Simulation of 3D Scenes via Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.23580v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Physics-aware symbolic simulation of 3D scenes is critical for robotics, embodied AI, and scientific computing, requiring models to understand natural language descriptions of physical phenomena and translate them into executable simulation environments. papers.title: AgenticCache: Cache-Driven Asynchronous Planning for Embodied AI Agents
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.24039v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Embodied AI agents increasingly rely on large language models (LLMs) for planning, yet per-step LLM calls impose severe latency and cost. papers.title: Characterizing Vision-Language-Action Models across XPUs: Constraints and Acceleration for On-Robot Deployment
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.24447v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are promising for generalist robot control, but on-robot deployment is bottlenecked by real-time inference under tight cost and energy budgets. papers.title: CF-VLA: Efficient Coarse-to-Fine Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.24622v2 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) policies offer strong expressivity for action generation, but suffer from a fundamental inefficiency: multi-step inference is required to recover action structure from uninformative Gaussian noise, leading to a poor efficiency-quality trade-off under real-time constraints. papers.title: EL3DD: Extended Latent 3D Diffusion for Language Conditioned Multitask Manipulation

papers.title: ESPADA: Execution Speedup via Semantics Aware Demonstration Data Downsampling for Imitation Learning
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2512.07371v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Behavior-cloning based visuomotor policies enable precise manipulation but often inherit the slow, cautious tempo of human demonstrations, limiting practical deployment. papers.title: Generative Control as Optimization: Time Unconditional Flow Matching for Adaptive and Robust Robotic Control
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2603.17834v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Diffusion models and flow matching have become a cornerstone of robotic imitation learning, yet they suffer from a structural inefficiency where inference is often bound to a fixed integration schedule that is agnostic to state complexity. papers.title: A Co-Evolutionary Theory of Human-AI Coexistence: Mutualism, Governance, and Dynamics in Complex Societies
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.22227v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Classical robot ethics is often framed around obedience, most famously through Asimov's laws. papers.reason: 研究情绪条件的人体姿态预测，侧重人机交互中的情感计算。虽提及世界模型，但应用场景为姿态预测而非机器人操作，偏离VLA核心。

papers.title: PhyloSDF: Phylogenetically-Conditioned Neural Generation of 3D Skull Morphology via Residual Flow Matching
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.25371v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Generating novel, biologically plausible three-dimensional morphological structures is a fundamental challenge in computational evolutionary biology, hampered by extreme data scarcity and the requirement that generated shapes respect phylogenetic relationships among species. In this work, we present PhyloSDF, a phylogenetically-conditioned neural generative model for 3D biological morphology that integrates two innovations: (1) a DeepSDF auto-dec
papers.reason: 利用残差流匹配生成系统发育条件的3D头骨形态，应用于计算进化生物学。与机器人操作无关，严格过滤。

papers.title: Learning biophysical models of gene regulation with probability flow matching
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.25062v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Cellular differentiation is governed by gene regulatory networks, the high-dimensional stochastic biochemical systems that determine the transcriptional landscape and mediate cellular responses to signals and perturbations. Although single-cell RNA sequencing provides quantitative snapshots of the transcriptome, current methods for inferring gene-regulatory dynamics often lack mechanistic interpretability and fail to generalize to unseen conditio
papers.reason: 使用概率流匹配学习基因调控的生物物理模型，属于计算生物学。与具身智能或机器人技术无实质关联，严格过滤。

papers.title: Conditional Flow Matching for Probabilistic Downscaling of Maximum 3-day Snowfall in Alaska
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.25172v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Precipitation in complex terrain is governed by orographic processes operating at scales of a few kilometers, yet climate models typically run at resolutions of 50--100~km where this topographic detail is absent. Dynamical downscaling with high-resolution regional models such as WRF can resolve these processes, but the computational cost -- months of wall-clock time per scenario -- precludes the large ensembles needed for uncertainty quantificati
papers.reason: 应用条件流匹配进行阿拉斯加降雪量的概率降尺度，属于气象学与气候建模。与机器人操作无关，严格过滤。
